summary: Tested two bug fixes: 1) Packaging Materials (الورقيات) page 500 error - FIXED, now returns 200 with data. 2) Daily Sales Target motivational message customization - WORKING, Admin can set custom message via dialog and it displays on dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/packaging-materials returns 200 (was 500 before fix due to duplicate route)
VERIFIED: Target dialog shows motivational message input (data-testid='target-message-input')
VERIFIED: Dashboard displays custom motivational message in sales target card
VERIFIED: Packaging materials page loads without errors, shows inventory data
seed_data_creation: Sales target set to 100000 IQD with motivational message 'نحن الأفضل! هيا نحقق الهدف!'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both fixes verified working: 1) Packaging materials API fixed by removing duplicate route in server.py - now uses modular route in inventory_system.py. 2) Motivational message feature added to sales target - POST accepts motivational_message, GET returns it, UI has input field and displays message on dashboard.
